heading: Veresdale vs Veresdale Scrub — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Veresdale, Queensland and Veresdale Scrub, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Veresdale and Veresdale Scrub have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Veresdale or Veresdale Scrub safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Veresdale has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Veresdale Scrub scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Veresdale scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Veresdale Scrub scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Veresdale or Veresdale Scrub?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Veresdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
